CREATE TABLE test_uint128 (id UHUGEINT, value UHUGEINT);
SELECT * FROM test_uint128 WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_uint128 WHERE value < 100);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_uint128 WHERE value > 0;
SELECT id, value FROM test_uint128 ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT id, value FROM test_uint128 WHERE id = (SELECT id FROM test_uint128 WHERE value = 1);
WITH temp AS (SELECT id, value FROM test_uint128 WHERE value > 1) SELECT AVG(value) FROM temp;
SELECT t1.id, t1.value, t2.id, t2.value FROM test_uint128 t1 JOIN test_uint128 t2 ON t1.id <> t2.id WHERE t1.value + t2.value = 340282366920938463463374607431768211456;
CREATE TABLE another_table (id UHUGEINT, description VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO another_table (id, description) VALUES (0, 'Zero value'), (1, 'Max value');
SELECT t1.id, t1.value, a.description FROM test_uint128 t1 JOIN another_table a ON t1.id = a.id WHERE t1.value = 0;
